prompt: A detailed, close-up photograph of a tightly-knit group of six smiling young adults in a modern, light-filled interior. In the foreground, two women face the camera, the one on the left with long dark hair wearing a black long-sleeved crop top and blue jeans, smiling gently. The woman on the right has long blonde hair, wearing a white blouse with a floral pattern and smocking, smiling broadly. Behind them, visible between and around, are three smiling men and another woman (seen mostly in profile). Far left, the side of a woman with long dark hair wearing a grey sweater and a silver necklace is visible. Behind the central dark-haired woman, a man with short brown hair in a dark shirt is smiling. In the back center, another man with short brown hair and a beard in a dark navy polo is smiling. Far right, another smiling man with brown hair in a dark jacket is present. The background shows light wood paneling, a wooden pillar, and a large window with a view to an outdoor patio with a concrete floor and some outdoor furniture under bright daylight. The focus is sharp on the foreground women, with a slightly shallower depth of field, capturing a warm, genuine group moment. The lighting is natural indoor light.
